_doc: Tracks the last point at which we audited the team-app repo for changes that could affect the customer-portal. Updated automatically by the sync workflow.
notes: Added shipment_booked customer-notify event + trigger. Trigger fires AFTER INSERT on warehouse_requests when quoted_price_cents IS NOT NULL (i.e. customer booked via the new portal calculator). Email goes to the requesting contact first (warehouse_requests.requested_by_contact_id), falling back to all portal-active contacts at the company. Subject: '✅ Shipment booked — €X to <city>' with carrier, speed, box count + weight, ship-out timing, VAT-aware price. Reply-to is the AM. customer-notify is at v7.
